title: Dress Up for Two

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
two single or multi-message switches
record:
each players name e.g. "Mum" on one switch 
"me" on the other
sections.middleText2:
selection of dress up items
two players, one can be the switch user

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. Hold up a dress-up item, such as funky sunglasses.
2. The switch user presses a switch to choose who wears it e.g., "Mum".

tooltipText: Use 2 switches to choose who is going to dress up in what e.g "Mum" wears the glasses "Dad" wears the hat
